specializations: Scalp care actives and anti-hair loss ingredients
Hair repair actives with clinical validation
Lipid-based delivery systems for scalp penetration
Distribution of clinically proven hair growth actives
product_highlights: Capixyl™ — clinically validated hair growth biomimetic peptide with red clover extract
Specialty lipid actives for enhanced scalp and follicle penetration
Hair care delivery systems targeting scalp and hair follicle
Anti-hair loss ingredient portfolio with clinical study support
notes: Lucas Meyer Cosmetics (part of Clariant) is a French cosmetic active ingredient specialist with a strong portfolio of hair and scalp care actives. As a distributor of Capixyl™, they provide one of the most clinically validated hair growth actives on the market. Their lipid-based delivery systems enhance the penetration and efficacy of hair care actives into the scalp and hair follicle, making them a strategic partner for premium anti-hair loss formulations.
